name: love-yourself-first
description: Marc Reklau's 30-day guide to self-esteem — overcoming insecurity, silencing the inner critic, and choosing happiness through self-acceptance and authenticity.
useCase: Building self-esteem, quieting negative self-talk, being authentic, choosing happiness, overcoming people-pleasing.
knownRisks: The 30-day format is simple and may feel repetitive to experienced readers
Self-help advice is not a substitute for therapy or treating clinical depression
Some techniques (like the mirror practice) may feel uncomfortable for some readers
